idea-plugin.name: MCP Server for Code Intelligence
idea-plugin.description:
An MCP (Model Context Protocol) server that runs inside the ReSharper/Rider backend process, exposing code intelligence features to AI assistants via HTTP.

Available tools:

  • find_usages — Find all references to a symbol
  • get_symbol_info — Get detailed symbol info: kind, type, params, docs, base types
  • find_implementations — Find implementations of interfaces/abstract classes
  • get_file_errors — Get compile errors and unresolved references
  • search_symbol — Search symbols by name across the solution
  • go_to_definition — Navigate to a symbol's declaration with source text
  • get_solution_structure — List projects, target frameworks, and references
  • browse_namespace — Browse namespace hierarchy
  • list_symbols_in_file — List all declarations in a file

Supports C#, F#, VB, and any language with a ReSharper PSI implementation.

The MCP server starts automatically on http://127.0.0.1:23741/ when you open a solution. Set the RESHARPER_MCP_PORT environment variable to use a different port.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.1.0

  • Initial release with 9 MCP tools
  • Language-agnostic PSI support (C#, F#, VB)
  • Symbol resolution by name or file position
  • Ambiguity detection with candidate list
